# takeout_sample — Sanitized Takeout Fixture

Anonymized Google Takeout export fixture for spec 013 Takeout ingestion, audio extract,
ASR, and mp4-to-video_id mapping automation tests.

## Structure

```
takeout_sample/
└── Takeout/
    └── YouTube 및 YouTube Music/
        ├── 채널/
        │   └── 채널.csv              — 1 anonymized channel row
        ├── 동영상 메타데이터/
        │   └── 동영상.csv            — 9 video metadata rows
        └── 동영상/
            ├── 1-1.강의제목A.mp4
            ├── 1-2.강의제목B.mp4
            ├── 2-1.강의제목C.mp4
            ├── 2-2.강의제목D.mp4
            ├── 3-1.강의제목E.mp4
            ├── 3-2.강의제목F.mp4
            ├── 5-1.임경민.mp4
            ├── 9-2.리차드방.mp4
            └── 19-2.허제은.mp4
```

## Video IDs and Metadata

| video_id      | title          | duration_ms | mp4 duration (s) | privacy  |
|---------------|----------------|-------------|-----------------|----------|
| aaaaaaaaaaa   | 1-1.강의제목A  | 3600000     | 1.0             | unlisted |
| bbbbbbbbbbb   | 1-2.강의제목B  | 2700000     | 1.0             | unlisted |
| ccccccccccc   | 2-1.강의제목C  | 1800000     | 1.0             | unlisted |
| ddddddddddd   | 2-2.강의제목D  | 3000000     | 1.0             | private  |
| eeeeeeeeeee   | 3-1.강의제목E  | 2400000     | 1.0             | unlisted |
| fffffffffff   | 3-2.강의제목F  | 3300000     | 1.0             | unlisted |
| ggggggggggg   | 5-1.임경민     | 105000      | 1.0             | unlisted |
| hhhhhhhhhhh   | 9-2.리차드방   | 1309000     | 1.0             | private  |
| iiiiiiiiiii   | 19-2.허제은    | 2948000     | 1.0             | private  |

## Notes

- All mp4 files are 1-second silent H.264/AAC test patterns generated by ffmpeg.
  Valid containers readable by ffprobe; contain no real lecture content.
- Metadata `근사치 길이(밀리초)` intentionally mismatches mp4 actual duration (1s) —
  simulates duration_match signal mismatch for evidence score testing (FR-003).
- All channel IDs, video IDs, and titles are anonymized fake values.
- `채널.csv` columns: `채널 ID`, `채널 이름`, `채널 URL`, `채널 핸들`, `국가`, `비공개 상태`
- `동영상.csv` columns: `동영상 ID`, `동영상 제목`, `동영상 URL`, `동영상 생성 타임스탬프`,
  `근사치 길이(밀리초)`, `채널 ID`, `카테고리`, `공개상태`, `오디오 언어`

## Generation

mp4 files were generated with:

```
ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i "color=c=black:s=320x240:d=1" \
       -f lavfi -i "anullsrc=r=16000:cl=mono:d=1" \
       -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -t 1 -c:a aac -shortest <title>.mp4
```
